From: "Sean J. Lancaster" <slancaster@bristolassociates.com>
Subject: FW: OFFER TO PURCHASE YOUR 2007 SK76++ sn 760667
Date: Fri, 09 May 2008 19:26:41 GMT
To: lesley@nysgllc.com, "Darren Indyke" <dkiesq@aol.com>, lvjet@aol.com
Cc: lvjet@aol.com

For Mr. E please.

 

This is an offer from the Brazilians again.  Mr. Oliveria has suggested that
he would pay $12.6.  He does not expect a response today an understands the
owner may not even see the offer until Monday.  I would suggest if we
decided to respond we draft a more formal Letter of Intent/Purchase
Agreement with much stronger language.  

 

I have also been told that we might see an offer next week from Wayne
Huizenga next week.  

 

Best regards 

 

 


Sean J. Lancaster

Bristol Associates Inc.

*+1-540-665-5135 direct

*+1-202-682-4000 ext 1130 Main Office

*+1-540-533-8183 Mobile

*+1-540-301-0050 FAX

 <mailto:%20slancaster@bristolassociates.com> *
slancaster@bristolassociates.com

* www.bristolassociates.com <http://www.bristolassociates.com/>  

 

This message may contain confidential and/or legally privileged information.
If you are not the intended recipient of the message, please destroy it. Any
unauthorized dissemination, distribution or copying of the material in this
message, and any attachments to the message, is strictly forbidden. (c) 2008
all rights reserved.

 

  _____  

From: ceo@planaer.com.br [mailto:ceo@planaer.com.br] 
Sent: Friday, May 09, 2008 2:52 PM
To: slancaster@bristolassociates.com
Subject: OFFER TO PURCHASE YOUR 2007 SK76++ sn 760667

 

Dear  Sean,

 

I have the following offer to purchase for this helicopter sn 760667: 

 

1. The helicopter shall be delivered in USA, with the FAA  C of A export
certificate to Brazil or to Venezuela ( to be advised) 

 

2. On the price shall be included the SK76++ initial course, in the Flight
Safety School. Courses for 2 Pilots + 2 mechanics ( at your costs)

 

3. Our offer is U$ 12.3Million.

 

4. If you accept that we can formalize and fax an OFFER TO PURCHASE with a
U$ 150K in IATS- Insured Aircraft Title Service, USA,  escrow refundable
deposit,  to retire the helicopter from the market and schedulle the acft.
visit and the pre-purchase inspection.

 

We also need your Aircraft Purchase Agreement draft to be analised and
approved by our attorneys

 

This offer is valid until may 12, 2008 16:00hs local time.

 

Sincerely

 

Jose A. Lins Oliveira     
CEO
PLANAER-Aviation Trade Brazil
Ph 55-11-3476 9951  // Cel.  55-11-9192 9887
Fax 55-11-5016 3860  
www.planaer.com.br

 

 

 

 

----- Original Message ----- 

From: Sean J. Lancaster <mailto:slancaster@bristolassociates.com>  

To: 'Jose Olivera' <mailto:joselins@globo.com>  ; 'Jose Olivera'
<mailto:ceo@planaer.com.br>  

Sent: Friday, May 09, 2008 12:48 PM

 

 

 

Best regards 

 

 


Sean J. Lancaster

Bristol Associates Inc.

*+1-540-665-5135 direct

*+1-202-682-4000 ext 1130 Main Office

*+1-540-533-8183 Mobile

*+1-540-301-0050 FAX

 <mailto:slancaster@bristolassociates.com> *
slancaster@bristolassociates.com

* www.bristolassociates.com

unauthorized dissemination, distribution or copying of the material in this
